### **Privacy concerns**

On rare occasions a rarity may appear on private land but access will be controlled so as to respect the wishes of the property owner. In such cases, the stakeout hotspot should be plotted some distance away from the actual location in a public area and ideally the name should indicate that the location plot is intentionally inaccurate and that the access is restricted. Ideally, once the bird of interest has departed, the hotspot can be moved to the correct location.
